message:
fix(importer): remove dead code with sqlite.IsUniqueConstraintError (bd-2kgr)

Remove commented-out code block that used sqlite.IsUniqueConstraintError.
This code was disabled and marked as "OLD CODE REMOVED" but still created
a leaky abstraction by referencing the sqlite package. The sqlite import
remains needed for BatchCreateOptions (separate issue bd-nrcp).
